hooks.command: $raw = try { [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() } catch { '' }; $d = try { $raw | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; $tool = if ($d -and $d.tool_name) { $d.tool_name } else { '' }; if ($tool) { Add-Type -Name FW -Namespace Win32 -MemberDefinition '[DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern IntPtr GetForegroundWindow(); [DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern int GetWindowThreadProcessId(IntPtr hwnd, out int lpdwProcessId);' -EA SilentlyContinue; $fwhnd = [Win32.FW]::GetForegroundWindow(); $fwpid = 0; [Win32.FW]::GetWindowThreadProcessId($fwhnd, [ref]$fwpid) | Out-Null; $fwproc = Get-Process -Id $fwpid -EA SilentlyContinue; if (-not ($fwproc -and $fwproc.Name -eq 'WindowsTerminal')) { [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $xml = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::GetTemplateContent([Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastTemplateType]::ToastText01); $xml.SelectSingleNode("//text[@id='1']").AppendChild($xml.CreateTextNode("Claude Code: jovahagyas szukseges: $tool")) | Out-Null; $toast = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification]::new($xml); $toast.ExpirationTime = [DateTimeOffset]::Now.AddSeconds(5); [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier('Claude Code').Show($toast) } }

$raw=try{[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()}catch{''}; $d=try{$raw|ConvertFrom-Json}catch{$null}; $tp=if($d -and $d.transcript_path){$d.transcript_path}else{''}; $u=$null; if($tp -and (Test-Path $tp)){$lines=Get-Content $tp -EA SilentlyContinue; for($i=$lines.Count-1;$i-ge 0;$i--){try{$o=$lines[$i]|ConvertFrom-Json -EA SilentlyContinue; $lu=if($o.message -and $o.message.usage){$o.message.usage}elseif($o.usage){$o.usage}else{$null}; if($lu -and $lu.input_tokens){$u=$lu;break}}catch{}}}; if($u){$ti=[int]($u.input_tokens); $to=[int]($u.output_tokens); $tr=[int]($u.cache_read_input_tokens); $ctx=[math]::Round(($ti+$tr)/200000*100,1); $yel=[char]::ConvertFromUtf32(0x1F7E1); $red=[char]::ConvertFromUtf32(0x1F534); $ico=if($ctx -lt 50){''}elseif($ctx -lt 75){$yel+' '}else{$red+' '}; @{systemMessage=('[CTX '+$ctx+'% '+$ico+' | in:'+[math]::Round($ti/1000,1)+'k cR:'+[math]::Round($tr/1000,1)+'k ki:'+[math]::Round($to/1000,1)+'k]')}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}else{@{systemMessage='[CTX n/a]'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}

$f = "$env:TEMP\aq_wakelock_$($env:WT_SESSION).pid"; if (Test-Path $f) { $id = [int](Get-Content $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); if ($id) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Add-Type -Name FW -Namespace Win32 -MemberDefinition '[DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern IntPtr GetForegroundWindow(); [DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern int GetWindowThreadProcessId(IntPtr hwnd, out int lpdwProcessId);' -EA SilentlyContinue; $fwhnd = [Win32.FW]::GetForegroundWindow(); $fwpid = 0; [Win32.FW]::GetWindowThreadProcessId($fwhnd, [ref]$fwpid) | Out-Null; $fwproc = Get-Process -Id $fwpid -EA SilentlyContinue; if (-not ($fwproc -and $fwproc.Name -eq 'WindowsTerminal')) { [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $xml = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::GetTemplateContent([Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastTemplateType]::ToastText01); $xml.SelectSingleNode("//text[@id='1']").AppendChild($xml.CreateTextNode('Claude Code: valasz kesz')) | Out-Null; $toast = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification]::new($xml); $toast.ExpirationTime = [DateTimeOffset]::Now.AddSeconds(5); [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier('Claude Code').Show($toast) }

[Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $xml = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::GetTemplateContent([Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastTemplateType]::ToastText01); $xml.SelectSingleNode("//text[@id='1']").AppendChild($xml.CreateTextNode('Claude Code: compact blokkova — indits uj chatet')) | Out-Null; $toast = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification]::new($xml); $toast.ExpirationTime = [DateTimeOffset]::Now.AddSeconds(10); [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier('Claude Code').Show($toast); Write-Output '{"continue": false}'
